final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing marketing poster / PPT cover slide for the automotive brand Changan, announcing the launch of the 长安起源Q06 in September.

Style/medium: high-end automotive brand key visual, photorealistic CGI render blended with sleek graphic design, inspired by premium Chinese auto brand launch campaigns
Composition: wide cinematic horizontal layout, car or brand emblem as central hero element, title text anchored in lower-center or lower-left, generous negative space above for visual breathing room
Subject: 长安起源Q06 as the hero subject — implied through bold typography and a dramatic silhouette or abstract form; brand identity expressed through clean geometric lines
Scene/backdrop: deep translucent cosmic or atmospheric backdrop — layered light rays, volumetric mist, and subtle particle bokeh creating a sense of depth and grandeur; dark navy-to-black gradient base with luminous breakout zones
Lighting/mood: dramatic rim lighting from behind, cool blue-white primary light source, warm amber accent glow, high contrast, awe-inspiring and premium
Color palette: deep space navy and carbon black as base; electric ice-blue as primary accent; warm gold or amber as secondary accent; white for typography
Materials/textures: smooth glass-like surface reflections, fine metallic sheen, soft volumetric light diffusion
Text (verbatim): "长安起源Q06" as main title, "9月上市" as subtitle
Constraints: text must be legible at standard 16:9 slide size; hierarchy must be clear — main title dominant, subtitle secondary; layout must feel like a premium automotive launch slide
Avoid: cluttered composition, stock-photo generic backgrounds, cartoonish rendering, lens flare overuse, watermarks, generic blue tech circuit patterns, cheap gradient overlays
